summary: GREENLIGHT Recovery Sprint - Iteration 486. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly. Funnel tracking for return_to_inspect and share_revisit working. API responses include userId/user_id fields as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GREENLIGHT Recovery Sprint verified: (1) POST /api/funnel/track accepts 'return_to_inspect' step - returns success:true, (2) POST /api/funnel/track accepts 'share_revisit' step - returns success:true, (3) Invalid funnel steps are rejected with success:false and error message, (4) GET /api/share/{id} returns userId field in response (Line 238 in share.py), (5) GET /api/public/creation/{slug} returns user_id field in creation object (Line 261 in public_routes.py), (6) Dashboard traction banner has onClick handler that fires trackFunnel('return_to_inspect') - only shows when viralStats has data (truth-based), (7) MySpacePage fires return_to_inspect on mount when referrer is from dashboard (Lines 848-855), (8) SharePage fires return_to_inspect when logged-in creator revisits their own share page (Lines 108-118), (9) PublicCreation fires return_to_inspect when logged-in creator revisits their own public page (Lines 111-120), (10) SharePage shows chain-depth-indicator (data-testid='chain-depth-indicator') when parentShareId is present (Lines 294-299), (11) Dashboard page loads with hero section, challenge banner, and viral stats, (12) MySpacePage shows viral stats (remixes inspired, new creator, creator levels) and First Viral Remix milestone

backend_api_tests.share_api_returns_userid: PASS - userId field present in response
backend_api_tests.public_creation_returns_user_id: PASS - user_id field present in creation
backend_api_tests.all_viral_loop_steps_accepted: PASS - Both return_to_inspect and share_revisit accepted

frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_page_loads: PASS - Hero section, challenge banner visible
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_traction_banner: INFO - Not visible for test user (expected - only shows when viralStats has data)
frontend_ui_tests.myspace_page_loads: PASS - Shows viral stats, milestones, in-progress jobs
frontend_ui_tests.share_page_error_handling: PASS - Shows 'Video Not Found' with CTA for non-existent shares
frontend_ui_tests.public_creation_error_handling: PASS - Shows 'Creation not found' with CTA for non-existent slugs

code_review_tests.dashboard_traction_banner_onclick: PASS - Line 1013 in Dashboard.js fires trackFunnel
code_review_tests.sharepage_chain_depth_indicator: PASS - Lines 294-299 in SharePage.jsx with data-testid='chain-depth-indicator'

features_verified.return_to_inspect_funnel_step: Added to FUNNEL_STEPS list at line 51
features_verified.share_revisit_funnel_step: Added to FUNNEL_STEPS list at line 52
features_verified.share_api_userid: Returns userId field in GET /api/share/{id} response
features_verified.public_creation_user_id: Returns user_id field in GET /api/public/creation/{slug} response
features_verified.dashboard_traction_banner: Shows when viralStats has data, onClick fires trackFunnel('return_to_inspect')
features_verified.myspace_return_to_inspect: Fires on mount when referrer is from dashboard
features_verified.sharepage_creator_revisit: Fires return_to_inspect when logged-in creator revisits their own share
features_verified.publiccreation_creator_revisit: Fires return_to_inspect when logged-in creator revisits their own public page
features_verified.chain_depth_indicator: Shows on SharePage when parentShareId is present (remix stories)
